name: io.github.forgesworn/402-mcp
description: L402 + x402 client for AI agents. Discover, pay for, and consume any Lightning-gated API autonomously. Multi-wallet (NWC, Cashu), multi-protocol (L402, x402, IETF Payment).

environmentVariables.description: Nostr Wallet Connect URI for autonomous Lightning payments
environmentVariables.name: NWC_URI

environmentVariables.description: Maximum sats to auto-pay per request
environmentVariables.name: MAX_AUTO_PAY_SATS
